examples: They took possession of his land and the land of Og king of Bashan, the two Amorite Kings east of the Jordan.
They took possession of his land and the land of og king of basha n the two amorite kings east of the jordan.
And the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead, and took it, and dispossessed the Amorite which was in it.
